title: Stop the World: I Want to Get Off
writer: Leslie Bricusse, Anthony Newley, David Donabie
actors: Tony Tanner, Millicent Martin, Leila Croft
plot: The show, set against a circus backdrop, focuses on Littlechap from the moment of his birth until his death. Each time something unsatisfactory happens, he calls out 'Stop the world!' and addresses the audience.
